docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2007 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM, MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TYRRELL, THOMAS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TYRRELL, TERESA JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDANT.
